items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Equipment maintenance blocks' as specified in the linked use case. However, the prior step evidence does not provide any information or data regarding the existence or state of such maintenance blocks. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status, as the requirement cannot be confirmed or denied without further information.
